summary: The test suite covers the core cartesian product, exclude/include rules, and strategy options reasonably well, but has significant gaps: (1) Entry-point script Invoke-MatrixGenerator.ps1 is untested directly—only tested via act integration tests; (2) Error handling is partially tested (missing dimensions, empty arrays) but lacks file I/O errors, invalid JSON, and error cases in Invoke-MatrixGenerator.ps1; (3) Edge cases are limited (no tests for partial rule matching against unknown dimensions, unicode values, duplicate includes, or very large matrices); (4) Test fixtures for act runs are referenced but content not shown, limiting evaluation of integration test completeness; (5) run-act-tests.ps1 mixes workflow structure tests with act integration, making them hard to run/debug independently. The design is clear with good Pester conventions, but fixtures are hardcoded rather than managed in separate files. Would catch basic regressions but miss error paths and boundary conditions.
